extDescription.message: Connect your browser to OSS, Pro, or self-hosted Password Pusher instances via APIv2.

popupSubtitle.message: Securely share links and text with expiring pushes.

popupRetrievalStepLabel.message: Require a 1-click retrieval step before full content

popupErrorReadCurrentUrl.message: Unable to read current tab URL.

popupErrorOnlyHttpHttps.message: Only http/https pages can be pushed.

popupErrorNoTextSelected.message: No text selected. Highlight text on the page and try again.

popupPushCreated.message: Push created. Copy the link or open QR.

popupErrorCreatePushBeforeQr.message: Create a push first to generate QR.

popupErrorRenderQr.message: Unable to render QR for this push.

popupErrorConvertQrPng.message: Unable to convert QR to PNG.

popupErrorConfigureServerFirst.message: Configure a Password Pusher server in Settings first.

popupSelectTextTitle.message: Select text on the page first, then push.

popupErrorSelectionReceivingEnd.message: Unable to read selected text from this tab. Reload the page and try again. If needed, close and reopen the popup after reloading.

popupErrorSelectionUnavailablePage.message: Selected text is unavailable on this page. Open a regular http/https webpage, highlight text, and try again.

popupErrorSelectionChromeInternal.message: Selected text is unavailable on browser internal pages (chrome://). Open a regular webpage and try again.

optionsHeroHeading.message: The Official Extension for Chrome and Firefox

optionsHeroIntro.message: Securely share links and text with expiring links and full audit logs. Built by the creators of Password Pusher.

optionsServerSelectionDescription.message: Self-hosted supports both OSS and Pro deployments. Hosted options are managed by Apnotic (creators of Password Pusher).

optionsUseSelfHostedHelp.message: Connect your own Password Pusher domain and deployment.

optionsSelfHostedPolicyNote.message: Enter the URL of your self-hosted Password Pusher instance.

optionsUsHostedHelp.message: US region hosting with Password Pusher Pro features.

optionsEuHostedHelp.message: EU region hosting with Password Pusher Pro features.

optionsOssHostedHelp.message: Public open source service managed by Apnotic.

optionsApiTokenHelp.message: You can leave the token empty for endpoints that allow anonymous create/read operations. When enabled, the token is stored in the browser's local storage (inaccessible by other extensions) and used for subsequent requests.

optionsRememberTokenHelp.message: When disabled, the token is kept only for the current browser session.

optionsAccountSelectionHelpDefault.message: Account selection is available for Pro instances.

optionsAboutHeading.message: About Password Pusher, Apnotic, and this extension

optionsAboutIntro1.message: This extension helps you quickly create secure, expiring pushes from your browser.

optionsAboutIntro2.message: Password Pusher is an open source tool for sharing sensitive content with automatic expiration. Learn more at pwpush.com, read the docs at docs.pwpush.com, review Best Practices, or view the OSS project on GitHub.

optionsAboutIntro3.message: Apnotic is the company behind Password Pusher and the managed hosted regions used by this extension. Learn more at apnotic.com.

optionsAboutIntro4.message: This extension is the official browser companion for Password Pusher. See project updates and source at github.com/apnotic/pwpush-chrome-extension.

optionsAboutTip.message: Tip: Add an API token (available under User → API Tokens) to enable additional features such as Audit Logging, Auto-Dispatch, File Uploads, and more.

optionsConfirmClearConfig.message: Clear this configuration and reset detected instance data?

optionsAccountHelpSelectedFuture.message: Selected account will be used for future Pro API requests.

optionsErrorMinimumOssVersion.message: This extension supports OSS Password Pusher $1 and newer. Detected version: $2. Please upgrade your OSS instance and try again.

optionsErrorHostPermissionDenied.message: Host permission was denied. This extension cannot call that server.

optionsAccountHelpHostedProOnly.message: Account selection is only available for hosted Pro instances (us/eu) when using an API token.

optionsAccountHelpAddToken.message: Add an API token to load available accounts.

optionsAccountHelpNoAccountsLoaded.message: No accounts loaded yet. Click Test connection to load accounts.

optionsAccountHelpOneAccount.message: This token has one account. It will be used automatically.

optionsAccountHelpChooseAccount.message: Choose which account this extension should use.

optionsErrorLoadAccountsForToken.message: Unable to load accounts for this token.

optionsStatusConnectionSucceededAccounts.message: Connection succeeded, but accounts could not be loaded.

optionsAccountHelpNoAccess.message: This token does not have access to any accounts.

optionsAccountHelpOneAvailable.message: This token has one available account.

optionsRequestsNotAvailableOss.message: Requests are not available in OSS

optionsAccountsNotAvailableOss.message: Accounts are not available in OSS

backgroundNoServerConfiguredYet.message: No server has been configured yet.

apiErrorEnterValidUrl.message: Enter a valid URL, including https://.

apiErrorInvalidJson.message: The server response was not valid JSON.

apiErrorTimeout.message: Request timed out. Please try again.

apiErrorNetwork.message: Unable to reach this server. Check URL, network, or CORS settings.

apiErrorPushNoShareUrl.message: Push created but no share URL was returned.

apiErrorMissingPushToken.message: Missing push token for preview lookup.

apiErrorAuthRequired.message: Authentication is required for this request.

apiErrorAccessForbidden.message: Access is forbidden for this request.

apiErrorEndpointNotFound.message: This endpoint was not found on the selected server. You may need to upgrade your instance to the latest version.
